flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Lynchburg fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (66.4% → 57.4%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Lynchburg fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (57.7% → 51.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Lynchburg fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).
